title: Digital Signatures: Proving Identity in the Digital World
description: Master digital signatures - the cryptographic mechanism for authentication and non-repudiation. Understand RSA signatures, ECDSA, and why these critical systems need quantum-resistant replacements.
learningObjectives: Explain the purpose and properties of digital signatures
Describe how RSA and ECDSA signature schemes work
Implement signature creation and verification using standard libraries
Understand the relationship between hashing and signing
Analyze why current signature schemes are quantum-vulnerable
Compare signature scheme properties: security, size, and performance
